title: Senior Software Engineer - Tata Consultancy Services - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Tata Consultancy Services - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Tata Consultancy Services has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Consultancy Services:
Tata Consultancy Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Consultancy Services!
